privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Unsplash landscape images (verified accessible and real). Primary image is photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 (mountain landscape at sunrise), fallback is photo-1519904981063-b0cf448d479e (hiker on mountain). Both images download as 800x533 RGB JPEGs. The verifier correctly uses 85% white pixel threshold (RGB>=240) to detect white layer creation, with 75% score required for pass. The landscape images contain no white pixels, making them suitable test data for white layer overlay verification.
